---
applyTo: "third_party/**"
---

These files are read-only reference material.

Do not suggest opportunistic cleanup or refactors in `third_party/**`.
If runtime integrations change, review for behavior alignment against the reference tree instead of editing the reference tree.
Preserve source alignment with `third_party/srtgo/srtgo/srt.py` and `third_party/srtgo/srtgo/ktx.py`.
